recommendations.title: Schedule Your Annual Eye Exam
recommendations.description: Your records show it's been over 12 months since your last vision screening. Your plan covers one routine eye exam per year at no cost.

recommendations.title: Flu Shot Reminder
recommendations.description: Flu season peak is approaching. Your plan covers flu vaccination at $0 copay at any in-network pharmacy.

recommendations.title: Try Our Stress Management Program
recommendations.description: Based on your recent behavioral health visit, you may benefit from our 8-week digital stress management program — included with your plan.

recommendations.title: Increase Daily Step Goal
recommendations.description: You've been averaging 7,500 steps per day. Try increasing to 8,500 for the next two weeks to build a stronger habit.
